data.title: Makino Milling Announces Correction to Tender Offer Response
data.description:
Makino Milling Machine Co ( (JP:6135) ) has issued an update.

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. announced a correction to its previous statement regarding its opposition to a tender offer by Nidec Corporation. The correction involves an extension of the response deadline for inquiries to the tender offeror from April 17 to April 22, 2025. This adjustment is part of Makino’s strategy to ensure adequate time for considering third-party proposals, which could impact the company’s strategic decisions and stakeholder interests.

More about Makino Milling Machine Co

Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd. operates in the manufacturing industry, specializing in milling machines and related equipment. The company is listed on the Prime Market of the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is known for its advanced machining solutions.

YTD Price Performance: 1.36%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.91B

data.title: Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Reports NTA Update
data.description:
An announcement from Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Units ( (AU:MOT) ) is now available.

Metrics Income Opportunities Trust announced an unaudited Net Tangible Asset Backing per share of $2.1471 as of April 14, 2025. This figure reflects the trust’s ongoing efforts to manage investment risks and seek potential gains, impacting its position in the financial services industry and providing stakeholders with insights into its financial health.

More about Metrics Income Opportunities Trust Units

Metrics Income Opportunities Trust, managed by The Trust Company (RE Services) Limited, is focused on providing monthly cash income, preserving investor capital, and managing investment risks through investments in private credit and other assets. The Trust Company is part of the Perpetual group, which operates in funds management, financial advisory, and trustee services.

data.title: Bass Oil Ltd Announces Successful Operations and Upcoming AGM
data.description:
An announcement from Bass Oil Ltd ( (AU:BAS) ) is now available.

Bass Oil Ltd has successfully completed a flow test at its Kiwi-1 well and maintained production and cash generation from its assets in Indonesia and the Cooper Basin. As the company looks forward to 2025, it remains committed to its growth strategy of becoming a mid-tier oil and gas producer, with significant planning underway to unlock value across its portfolio. The company has announced its 2025 Annual General Meeting, encouraging shareholders to participate and submit proxies in advance.

More about Bass Oil Ltd

Bass Oil Ltd operates in the oil and gas industry, focusing on the exploration and production of oil and gas assets. The company is primarily involved in sustaining oil production across its portfolio, with significant assets in the Cooper Basin and Indonesia.

data.title: Value Creation Co., Ltd. Reports FY2025 Financial Results and Growth Plans
data.description:
Value Creation Co., Ltd ( (JP:9238) ) has provided an announcement.

Value Creation Co., Ltd. reported its non-consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending February 28, 2025, showing a 16.4% increase in net sales but a decline in operating and ordinary profits by 29.6% and 21.0%, respectively. The company plans to improve its financial performance in the coming year with projected increases in net sales and profits, indicating a strategic focus on growth and value creation for stakeholders.

More about Value Creation Co., Ltd

Value Creation Co., Ltd. operates in the financial sector and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company focuses on creating value through its financial services and products, aiming to enhance shareholder returns and market presence.

data.title: Fletcher Building Releases Director Shareholding Disclosures
data.description:
Fletcher Building Limited ( (FRCEF) ) has shared an announcement.

Fletcher Building Limited has released ongoing disclosure notices for Andrew Clarke and Claire Carroll, highlighting changes in their shareholdings. Andrew Clarke, a former Commercial Director, has increased his beneficial interest in the company’s ordinary shares through the vesting of award shares under Fletcher Building’s employee share plan. This disclosure is part of the company’s compliance with the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013, ensuring transparency in the trading activities of its directors and senior managers.

More about Fletcher Building Limited

Fletcher Building Limited is a prominent company based in Auckland, New Zealand, operating in the construction and building materials industry. The company is known for its diverse range of products and services, including the manufacturing and distribution of building materials, construction, and infrastructure development, with a significant market presence in New Zealand and Australia.

data.title: Tongda Hong Tai Holdings Announces Annual General Meeting and Key Resolutions
data.description:
Tongda Hong Tai Holdings Ltd ( (HK:2363) ) has provided an update.

Tongda Hong Tai Holdings Limited has announced its upcoming annual general meeting scheduled for May 8, 2025, in Hong Kong. The meeting will address several key resolutions, including the adoption of the 2024 financial statements, re-election of directors, and authorization of directors’ and auditors’ remuneration. Additionally, the company seeks approval to allot and issue shares, with specific conditions outlined for the share issuance process. This announcement signifies the company’s ongoing governance and operational planning, potentially impacting its strategic direction and shareholder engagement.

data.title: Wellard Ltd Approves Sale of MV Ocean Drover and Capital Return
data.description:
The latest update is out from Wellard Ltd. ( (AU:WLD) ).

Wellard Ltd has announced that its shareholders have approved the sale of the MV Ocean Drover, a livestock vessel, for US$50 million. The proceeds from this sale will be returned to shareholders at a rate of 15 cents per share. The sale is anticipated to occur in the last week of July, with the capital return expected around August 28, 2025. This decision reflects Wellard’s strategic move to optimize its asset portfolio and provide direct financial benefits to its shareholders.

More about Wellard Ltd.

Wellard Ltd operates in the livestock transportation industry, focusing on the export of live animals. The company is known for its fleet of specialized vessels designed for the safe and efficient transport of livestock across international waters.

data.title: Courage Investment Group Releases 2024 Annual Report
data.description:
An announcement from Courage Investment Group Limited ( (HK:1145) ) is now available.

Courage Investment Group Limited has announced the publication of its Annual Report for the year ended December 31, 2024. The report is available on the company’s website as well as on the Hong Kong and Singapore stock exchanges’ websites. Shareholders are encouraged to access the report online, but can request a printed version if needed. The company emphasizes the importance of shareholders providing a functional email address to receive electronic notifications of such publications.

More about Courage Investment Group Limited

Courage Investment Group Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability. It is listed on both the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and the Singapore Exchange. The company is involved in investment activities, although specific industry details or primary products and services are not provided in the release.
